name: Funghi Porcini Al Tegame
recipeIngredient: 6 large ripe tomatoes, peeled, seeded and coarsely chopped
some slices of french bread fried in butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean and slice the mushrooms.
2. Heat the oil in a shallow pan (preferably earthenware).
3. Add the anchovies and cook until they dissolve into a paste.
4. Add the mushrooms, garlic, tomatoes, mint, salt, and pepper.
5. Cover the pan and cook over medium-high heat, stirring occasionally, for about 15 minutes.
6. Discard the crushed garlic.
7. Serve the mushrooms very hot, garnished with the fried bread.
